title: Update app name to XetaChat in top bar

requirements.text: Update the app header/top bar in App.tsx to display 'XetaChat' as the app name, replacing any previous name or placeholder text currently shown there.

quotes: in the app change the name from top bar too

acceptanceCriteria: The top bar/header visibly displays 'XetaChat' as the app name on all screens
No previous app name or placeholder text remains in the header
The change is consistent across both the pairing view and the chat view

nonGoals: Changing any other UI text or labels beyond the top bar app name
